titles.title: Sheltered in the Arms of God

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I feel the touch of hands so kind and tender. They're leading me in the paths that I must trod. I'll have no fear when Jesus walks beside me For I'm sheltered in the arms of God.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So let the storm rage high, The dark clouds rise, They don't worry me; For I'm sheltered safe in the arms of God. He walks with me, And naught of earth can harm me, Sheltered safe within the arms of God.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Soon I shall hear the call from heaven's portals 'Come home my child, It's the last mile you must trod' I'll fall asleep And wake in God's new heaven Sheltered safe within the arms of God
